{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ancient Scale
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ancient Scale]] is a [[Divine Treasure]] that adds protection to the user.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ancient Scale]] is an item [[Yan Shoumei]] received from [[Seshethkunaaz]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
